sections.requirement: Form 1C - Documents on File page displays a list of documents to be maintained by an organization. To complete Form 1C, provide the date of the last review/revision for each item listed. Select N/A if an item is not applicable, where available.
sections.evidence:
Personnel policies, including selection and dismissal procedures, salary and benefit scales, employee grievance procedures, and equal opportunity practices.
09/24/2025
Policies/procedures consistent with E.O. 14273 and terms of awards to make insulin and injectable epinephrine available at or below the discounted price paid by the health center awardee or sub-awardee under the 340B Drug Pricing Program (plus a minimal administration fee) to individuals with low incomes who: (a) have a high cost-sharing requirement for either insulin or injectable epinephrine; (b) have a high unmet deductible; or (c) have no health care insurance. For this purpose, "a low-income individual" means an individual living in a household with an income level at or below 200 percent of the Federal Poverty Guidelines.
08/27/2025
Procurement procedures.
09/24/2025
Standards of Conduct/Conflict of Interest policies/procedures.
08/27/2025
Financial Management/Accounting and Internal Control policies and/or procedures to ensure awarded Health Center Program federal funds are not expended for restricted activities.
09/24/2025
Financial Management/Accounting and Internal Control policies/procedures related to restrictions on the use of federal funds for the purchase of sterile needles or syringes for the hypodermic injection of any illegal drug.1 (Only applicable if your organization provides syringe exchange services or is otherwise engaged in syringe service programs; otherwise, indicate as N/A.)
[X]
Financial Management/Accounting and Internal Control policies/procedures related to restrictions on the use of federal funds to provide abortion services, except in cases of rape or incest or where there is a threat to the life of the mother.2 (Only applicable if your organization provides abortion services; otherwise, indicate as N/A.)
[X]
Billing and Collections policies/procedures, including those regarding waivers or fee reductions and refusal to pay.
09/24/2025

results.question: Does the application contain all required attachments listed in the guidance?
results.evidence: The Table of Contents lists Attachments 1-5, 7-13, but Attachment 6 is missing. All other required attachments (Project Narrative, SF-424, Budget, Forms 1A-8, Attachments 1-5, 7-13) are present. Attachment 6 is not listed.
results.reasoning: The application guidance requires Attachments 1-12 (sometimes more, depending on program). The Table of Contents skips from Attachment 5 to Attachment 7, indicating Attachment 6 is missing. All other required attachments and forms are present.
results.details: Attachments found: 1 (Service Area Map), 2 (Bylaws), 3 (Org Chart), 4 (Position Descriptions), 5 (Biosketches), 7 (Contracts/Agreements), 8 (Articles of Incorporation), 9 (Collaboration Docs), 10 (Sliding Fee), 11 (Nonprofit Status), 12 (Operational Plan), 13 (Compliance). Attachment 6 is missing. Project Narrative, SF-424, Budget Narrative, Forms 1A, 1C, 2, 3, 5A, 5B, 5C, 6A, 6B, 8, 12 are present.

results.question: Is the applicant an eligible entity as mentioned in the guidance (e.g. non-profit, governmental unit)?
results.evidence: The SF-424 (Table of Contents and application body) lists the applicant as 'Nonprofit with 501C3' and provides an IRS Non-Profit Letter (Attachment 11). The legal name is Family Practice & Counseling Services Network, Inc.
results.reasoning: The applicant is a non-profit corporation registered in Pennsylvania and with the IRS, as evidenced by the SF-424 and Attachment 11. This meets HRSA eligibility requirements.
results.details: Entity type: Nonprofit with 501C3. Evidence: SF-424, Attachment 11 (IRS Non-Profit Letter).

results.question: Other comments
results.evidence: No other major issues or comments are apparent from the provided evidence. The application is thorough and includes all required forms and attachments except Attachment 6.
results.reasoning: No other notable observations or concerns beyond the missing Attachment 6.

results.question: Did the applicant include a Project Narrative?
results.evidence: Table of Contents, item 5: Project Narrative; Narrative text begins on page 1 under 'Family Practice & Counseling Services Network 2026 Service Area Competition Application'.
results.reasoning: The Table of Contents lists a Project Narrative, and the narrative text is present starting on page 1, fulfilling the requirement.

results.question: Public Agencies: Does the application include Attachment 6: Co-Applicant Agreement?
results.evidence: Table of Contents does not list Attachment 6: Co-Applicant Agreement.
results.reasoning: Attachment 6: Co-Applicant Agreement is not included in the Table of Contents or anywhere in the attachments, indicating it was not submitted.

results.question: New applicant: Does the application include Attachment 11: Evidence of Nonprofit or Public Agency Status?
results.evidence: Table of Contents, item 18: Attachment 11: Evidence of Nonprofit, Public Agency, or Tribal or Urban Indian Organization Status (as applicable) (Attachment 11 - FPCSN Non-Profit IRS Letter.pdf)
results.reasoning: Attachment 11 is present and labeled as the required evidence of nonprofit status, which is required for new applicants.

results.question: New and Competing Supplement applicants: Does the application include Attachment 12: Operational Plan?
results.evidence: Table of Contents, item 19: Attachment 12: Operational Plan (Attachment 12 - FPCSN Operational Plan.pdf)
results.reasoning: Attachment 12: Operational Plan is included, as required for new and competing supplement applicants.

results.question: Does the applicant propose to perform a substantive role in the project (i.e., does not apply on behalf of another organization)?
results.evidence: Project Narrative, page 1: 'The health center has established the new FPCSN non-profit corporation, which meets all of the requirements of the HRSA Health Center Program, and is now applying as a new applicant for the area it has served for many years.'
results.reasoning: The applicant is applying as itself, not on behalf of another organization, and describes its direct role in the project.

results.question: Does the applicant propose to make General Primary Medical Care available directly (Column I) and/or through formal written contractual agreements in which the health center pays for the service (Column II)?
results.evidence: Project Narrative, page 15: 'FPCSN's health centers provide all of the required primary care services... All of the services on Form 5A are provided directly, except for radiology and intrapartum care.'
results.reasoning: The narrative confirms that general primary medical care is provided directly at the health center sites, meeting the requirement.

results.question: Does the applicant propose a service area announced under this NOFO number? If the answer to Question 10 is "No", select "N/A" for Questions 11 through 15.
results.evidence: SAAT Service Area: Greensboro, PA (Urban); Application: Service area is Philadelphia, PA (see Project Narrative, Table of Contents, Project Abstract, and Attachment 1).
results.reasoning: The application proposes to serve Philadelphia, PA, while the SAAT data is for Greensboro, PA. The service areas do not match, so the applicant does not propose a service area announced under this NOFO number.

results.question: Is the total number of unduplicated patients projected to be served in the assessment period on Form 1A at least 75 percent of the SAAT Patient Target?
results.evidence: Question 10 is 'No', so per instructions, this question is N/A.
results.reasoning: Since the applicant does not propose the announced service area, this question is not applicable.

results.evidence: Question 10 is 'No', so per instructions, this question is N/A.
results.reasoning: Since the applicant does not propose the announced service area, this question is not applicable.

results.question: Does the applicant request annual SAC funding that does NOT exceed the SAAT Total Funding for the service area?
results.evidence: Question 10 is 'No', so per instructions, this question is N/A.
results.reasoning: Since the applicant does not propose the announced service area, this question is not applicable.

results.question: Does the applicant maintain the current funding distribution (i.e., CHC, MSAW, HP, RPH) from the SAAT?
results.evidence: Question 10 is 'No', so per instructions, this question is N/A.
results.reasoning: Since the applicant does not propose the announced service area, this question is not applicable.

results.question: Does the applicant propose to serve patients for each population type listed in the SAAT?
results.evidence: Question 10 is 'No', so per instructions, this question is N/A.
results.reasoning: Since the applicant does not propose the announced service area, this question is not applicable.
